resources.string: The mirror reflects perfection; any movement would only mar it.

Crystal mirrors repeat the flawless face until the world has no room left. Ghosts sing softly of victories that may never have happened. A scratch on the armor matters more than the blade that made it. The perfect pose is held for a breath, then an hour, then forever. Flesh cools into a monument. The admirer and the idol become the same silent stone.
